description: `app/data/wormholes.json` is missing ~32 shattered/drifter systems. Generate the missing entries deterministically from SDE — J-systems use real coords in `mapSolarSystems` (XZ projection for top-down map). Then re-run `scripts/build_wormhole_positions.py` to regenerate `wormhole_positions.json` so the star map actually renders the new entries. Verify on /map after deploy. Pochven systems are NOT J-space (they have K-space IDs ~30002000) — keep them outside this scope.
title: Fill wormhole data gaps and regenerate positions
